revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=川田神社| 所在地=滋賀県甲賀市水口町北内貴490| 祭神=[[天湯川桁命]]
[[天川田奈命]]| 社格=式内社（名神大）
県社| 創建=[[垂仁天皇]]御宇| 本殿=一間社[[流造]]| 例祭=[[4月25日]]| 神事=古式揚矢祭}} '''川田神社'''（かわたじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[甲賀市]]水口町に鎮座する[[神社]]である。[[垂仁天皇]]の御宇に創祀されたと伝わる。延喜式に記載された[[名神大社]]である。[[享保]]11年には正一位の神階を受けた。[[明治]]9年に[[村社]]、明治17年に[[郷社]]、[[昭和]]11年に[[県社]]に列した。 == 祭神 == * [[天湯川桁命]] * [[天川田奈命]] 〈配祀神〉 * [[天児屋根命]] * [[大己貴命]] == 神紋 == :下り藤 == 祭り == * 例祭 :4月25日に行われる。 * 古式揚矢祭 == 境内社 == * 天満宮 == 関連項目 == * [[神道]] * [[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:かわたしんしやこうかし}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:府県社]] [[Category:甲賀市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社| 名称=川田神社| 所在地=滋賀県甲賀市水口町北内貴490| 祭神=[[天湯川桁命]]
[[天川田奈命]]| 社格=式内社（名神大）

{{神社 |名称 = 川田神社 |画像 = [[Image:Kawata-jinja-1.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = 滋賀県甲賀市水口町北内貴490 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = [[天湯川桁命]]
[[天川田奈命]] |社格 = 式内社（名神大）論社・旧県社 |創建 = 伝垂仁天皇朝 |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[4月25日]] |神事 = 古式揚矢祭（2月20日） }} '''川田神社'''（かわたじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[甲賀市]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 祭神 == * [[天湯川桁命]] * [[天川田奈命]] 〈配祀神〉 * [[天児屋根命]] * [[大己貴命]] == 神紋 == *下り藤 == 由緒 == [[垂仁天皇]]の時代に創祀されたと伝わる。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載された[[名神大社]]の[[論社]]。[[享保]]11年（[[1726年]]）には正一位の[[神階]]を受けた。[[蔵田荘]]の[[惣社]]。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）に[[村社]]、同17年（[[1884年]]）に[[郷社]]、[[昭和]]11年（[[1936年]]）に[[県社]]に列した。 == 祭り == * 例祭 :4月25日に行われる。 * 古式揚矢祭（ようやまつり） == 境内社 == * 天満宮 == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 川田神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かわたしんしや こうかし}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名かわたしんしや こうかし]] [[Category:元伊勢]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]] [[Category:甲賀市]]

{{Shrine |Name = Kawata Shrine (川田神社) |Image = [[Image:Kawata-jinja-1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden |Location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}{{ill|Minakuchi|de|Minakuchi|ja|水口町}} Kitauchitak 490 |Coordinates= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}}
Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}} |MainHall = {{ill|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|de|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = {{ill|April 25|de|25. April|ja|4月25日}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name = Kawata Shrine (川田神社) |Image = [[Image:Kawata-jinja-1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden |Location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}{{ill|Minakuchi|de|Minakuchi|ja|水口町}} Kitauchitak 490 |Coordinates= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}}
Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}} |MainHall = {{ill|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|de|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = {{ill|April 25|de|25. April|ja|4月25日}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Shrine |Name = Kawata Shrine (川田神社) |Image = [[Image:Kawata-jinja-1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden |Location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}{{ill|Minakuchi|de|Minakuchi|ja|水口町}} Kitauchitak 490 |Coordinates= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}}
Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}} |MainHall = {{ill|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|de|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = {{ill|April 25|de|25. April|ja|4月25日}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name = Kawata Shrine (川田神社) |Image = [[Image:Kawata-jinja-1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden |Location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}{{ill|Minakuchi|de|Minakuchi|ja|水口町}} Kitauchitak 490 |Coordinates= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}}
Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}} |MainHall = {{ill|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|de|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = {{ill|April 25|de|25. April|ja|4月25日}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Shrine |Name = Kawata Shrine (川田神社) |Image = [[Image:Kawata-jinja-1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden |Location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}{{ill|Minakuchi|de|Minakuchi|ja|水口町}} Kitauchitak 490 |Coordinates= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}}
Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}} |MainHall = {{ill|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|de|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = {{ill|April 25|de|25. April|ja|4月25日}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myojin taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto Ise]] [[Category:Former prefectural shrines of Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Kawata Shrine}}

April|ja|4月25日|12=draft}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県|12=draft}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市|12=draft}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|12=draft}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|12=draft}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|12=draft}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇|12=draft}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|12=draft}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階|12=draft}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|12=draft}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治|12=draft}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|12=draft}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|12=draft}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和|12=draft}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|12=draft}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myojin taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto Ise]] [[Category:Former prefectural shrines of Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Kawata Shrine}}

April|ja|4月25日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kawata Shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myojin taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto Ise]] [[Category:Former prefectural shrines of Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]]

It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myojin taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former prefectural shrines of Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]]

In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myojin taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines of Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]]

April|ja|4月25日|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|de|Shinto-Schrein|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|de|Präfektur Shiga|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Kōka|de|Kōka|ja|甲賀市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|de|Kaiser Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of {{ill|Kyōhō|de|Kyōhō|ja|享保|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in {{ill|Shinkai|de|Shinkai|ja|神階|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of {{ill|Shōwa|de|Shōwa-Zeit|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myojin taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]]

In the 9th year of {{ill|Meiji|de|Meiji-Zeit|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}} (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=}}) in the 17th year (1884). Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]]

In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:甲賀市の建築物]] [[Category:甲賀市の歴史]]

In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[en:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]]

Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kōka City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]]

Reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]] |MainHall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri]] |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = [[:en:April 25|April 25]] |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]]. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onamuchi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]]. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Village_shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]]

Haiden |Location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]][[:en:Minakuchi, Shiga|Minakuchi]] Kitauchitak 490 |Coordinates= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=}}
Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]] |MainHall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri]] |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = [[:en:April 25|April 25]] |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]]. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onamuchi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]]. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Village_shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[ja:%E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:paes with no wikidata]]

In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Village_shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:paes with no wikidata]] [[Category:paes with no wikidata]]

Haiden |Location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]][[:en:Minakuchi, Shiga|Minakuchi]] Kitauchitak 490 |Coordinates= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|57|37.7|N|136|09|21.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=}}
Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]] |MainHall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri]] |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = [[:en:April 25|April 25]] |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]]. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onamuchi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]]. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Village_shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]]

Reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]] |MainHall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri]] |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = [[:en:April 25|April 25]] |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]]. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onamuchi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]]. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Village_shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

Amekawatana no Mikoto |ShrineRank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|de|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} ({{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|WD=Q9610964}}) ''ronsha''
Former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]] |MainHall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri]] |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = [[:en:April 25|April 25]] |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]]. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=|1=Ame-no-Yukawata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q52319907}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onamuchi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主|1=Ōkuninushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q276944}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]]. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|WD=Q9610964}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

Former {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |Established= (Trad.) Reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]] |MainHall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Ikkensha-nagare-zukuri]] |OtherName = |Pilgrimage = |MainFestival = [[:en:April 25|April 25]] |Ritual = Koshiki Ageya Festival (February 20) }} '''Kawata Jinja''' (川田神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]][[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Kōka]]. == Deities == * {{ill|Ame-no-Yakawa|de|Ame-no-Yakawa|ja|天湯河板挙|lt=Ame-no-Yakawa|lt_ja=天湯川桁命|lt_de=Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Yakawa|qq=|1=Ame-no-Yukawata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q52319907}} – Ancestor deity of the Tottori-no-Muraji * Amekawatana no Mikoto (Enshrined together) * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|de|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋根命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Koyane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天児屋命}} * {{ill|Onamuchi no Mikoto|de|Onamuchi no Mikoto|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onamuchi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主|1=Ōkuninushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q276944}} == Shrine Crest == * Trailing wisteria (下り藤) == History == According to tradition, it was founded during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]]. Listed as a {{ill|Myojin Taisha|de|Myojin Taisha|ja|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myojin Taisha|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|WD=Q9610964}} in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, it is one of the ''ronsha'' (theories) regarding that identification. In the 11th year of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (1726), the shrine was elevated to Shōichii (正一位) in [[:en:Shinkai (divine rank)|Shinkai]]. It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

It served as the ''sōja'' of {{ill|Kurata-shō|de|Kurata-shō|ja|蔵田荘|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurata-shō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the 9th year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1876), it was designated a ''sonsha'' ({{ill|village shrine|de|Dorfschrein|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}), then became a ''gōsha'' ({{ill|town shrine|de|Ortschrein|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/town shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}) in the 17th year (1884). In the 11th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]] (1936), it was raised to the status of {{ill|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Prefectural shrine|de|Präfekturschrein|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/prefectural shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. == Festivals == * Main Festival : Held on April 25. * Koshiki Ageya Festival (Yōya Matsuri) == Subsidiary Shrine == * Tenman-gū == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=564 Kawata Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)|version=81271364|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[zh:川田神社]] [[de:Kawata Jinja]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[ja:川田神社]] [[sn:Kawata Shrine]] [[sn:E5%B7%9D%E7%94%B0%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E7%94%B2%E8%B3%80%E5%B8%82%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%A3%E7%94%BA%E5%8C%97%E5%86%85%E8%B2%B4)]] [[sn:awata Shrine]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Buildings in Koka, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Koka, Shiga]] [[ja:川田神社 (甲賀市水口町北内貴)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:qq]]
